description: You are a stage manager at a community theatre company. Format the raw text of Anton Chekhov's one-act play 'The Bear' in the document /home/ga/Documents/the_bear_script.odt into a professional theatrical script. Apply the formatting rules for title page layout, character list structuring, bolding, italics, and typography as specified in the guide at /home/ga/Desktop/script_formatting_guide.txt. Save the formatted document to /home/ga/Documents/the_bear_script.odt.

metadata.title: THE BEAR
metadata.subtitle: A Joke in One Act
metadata.author: by Anton Chekhov
metadata.setting_text: A drawing room in Popova's house.
normal_text_not_bold_or_italic: I have never in my life seen such impudence
I invite you to a duel
key_phrases: I shall remain faithful to the grave
You must pay me my twelve hundred roubles
I have never in my life seen such impudence
I invite you to a duel
